title: P1 integration: run full corpus after all P1 fixes
description: After all P1 fixes are implemented (has_advanced_since_error, breakdown_lookahead, pop_pending/pop_error), integrate them together and run the full 1619 corpus tests. Report pass/fail counts and analyze any new regressions or improvements. Ensure build clean and all unit tests pass.
close_reason: P1 integration corpus: 1525 PASS / 57 FAIL (Lua SKIP). Identical to DynPrec baseline — P1 fixes are correctness-neutral on cold-parse corpus. Expected since breakdownLookahead and PopPending/PopError affect incremental parsing paths.
